_WARNING: SIMULATION ONLY — Merkle root signature is not cryptographically valid

merkle_root.description: Merkle root over all audit evidence entries in 02_audit_logging/evidence/. Recomputed on each audit cycle.

signature._WARNING: SIMULATION_ONLY — not a real Dilithium3 signature

notes: This file is regenerated each time the audit Merkle tree is recomputed. The merkle_root.root_hash and signature must be updated together. A zero root_hash indicates no evidence entries have been processed yet.
